name: Modify User Preferences Performance Test
description: Validate the performance and responsiveness of the partial update operation for user preferences when multiple users update their settings concurrently.
preconditions: User accounts must be pre-created and accessible.
Valid authentication tokens must be provided in the Authorization header.
Preferences functionality must be enabled in the application.

input data.type of load: Concurrent load test simulating 50 PATCH operations

metrics.target value: Changes visible via subsequent GET requests

notes: Ensure preference changes are verified through follow-up GET requests and distribute updates across test users to avoid conflicts.
